titles.title: Foster Youth Postsecondary Education Access and Success Act
Foster Youth Postsecondary Education Access and Success Act
Foster Youth Postsecondary Education Access and Success Act
To amend section 477 of the Social Security Act to increase the maximum education and training voucher amount and provide greater support for foster youth pursuing postsecondary education.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute by the Yeas and Nays: 39 - 0.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Ways and Means. H. Rept. 119-638.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 555.

committee.name: House Ways and Means
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
